hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js)$' && npx prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && npx eslint "$f" --max-warnings=0 2>&1 | head -20; } 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '(babel|metro)\.config\.' && echo '{"systemMessage": "Metro config changed — restart with: npx expo start --clear"}'; } 2>/dev/null || true
